journey.name: Withdrawal Flow Journey
journey.description: Journey tests for withdrawal and signing flows

actions.action: Test case 1: Successful Withdrawal with Passkey - Verify the Withdrawal screen is shown with title "Withdrawal". - Verify that the Continue button is disabled. - Enter "100" in the "Enter Amount" input field. - Verify that the Continue button is now enabled. - Tap the "Continue" button. - Confirm the loading spinner appears on the Continue button. - Wait for navigation and confirm the app is on the "Authorize Withdrawal" screen. - Verify the description "Please choose a signing option below to authenticate this transaction request." is visible. - Tap the "Sign with Passkey" button. - Confirm that the signing loading state is shown with "Signing with Passkey" text. - Wait for navigation back to the Withdrawal screen. - Confirm that the final screen displays the success message "Transaction was successful".

Test case 2: Cancel Withdrawal via Back Button - Verify the Withdrawal screen is shown with title "Withdrawal". - Enter "50" in the "Enter Amount" input field. - Tap the "Continue" button. - Wait for navigation and confirm the app is on the "Authorize Withdrawal" screen. - Tap the back button with content description "Back". - Confirm the app navigates back to the Withdrawal screen. - Verify that the "Enter Amount" field still contains "50". - Verify that the Continue button is enabled.

Test case 3: Successful Withdrawal with OTP - Verify the Withdrawal screen is shown with title "Withdrawal". - Enter "250" in the "Enter Amount" input field. - Tap the "Continue" button. - Wait for navigation and confirm the app is on the "Authorize Withdrawal" screen. - Tap the "Sign with OTP" button. - Confirm that the signing loading state is shown with "Signing with OTP" text. - Wait for navigation back to the Withdrawal screen. - Confirm that the final screen displays the success message "Transaction was successful".
